title: Deferred and Accrued Revenues/Expenses: A real estate company collected 12000 in advance rent for...
summary: Prepare journal entries for advance cash collection and monthly recognition of deferred revenue.
prompt: A real estate company collected $12,000 in advance rent for six months. Prepare the journal entries for the collection and the recognition of revenue in the first month.
correct_option: Debit Cash $12,000, Credit Deferred Revenue $12,000; Debit Deferred Revenue $2,000, Credit Rent Revenue $2,000
answer_text: Debit Cash $12,000, Credit Deferred Revenue $12,000; Debit Deferred Revenue $2,000, Credit Rent Revenue $2,000
solution: Step 1: When cash is collected, the entry will be: Debit Cash $12,000 and Credit Deferred Revenue $12,000. Step 2: Monthly recognition of revenue will be: Debit Deferred Revenue $2,000 and Credit Rent Revenue $2,000, recognizing one month's worth of rent.
